# Sold With Paul — Paul Fernandez, REALTOR

> Paul Fernandez is a Southern California REALTOR (CA DRE #01835505) at NexGen Realtors with 200+ transactions, a 103% list-to-sold ratio, and a 25-day average days on market. He serves sellers and buyers across Los Angeles, Orange, Riverside, and San Bernardino counties.

Paul specializes in residential and commercial real estate across the greater Southern California region. His website provides current market data powered by Infosparks (174 cities tracked), neighborhood profiles, and educational content for home sellers.

Key stats: 200+ transactions, 103% list-to-sold ratio, 25-day average DOM, highest over-asking difference of $90,000, highest transaction $4.4M.

Contact: (562) 225-9775 | paul@soldwithpaul.com

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://soldwithpaul.com/): Main landing page with Paul's value proposition, testimonials, and services overview
- [About](https://soldwithpaul.com/about.html): Paul's background, career stats, certifications, and approach to real estate
- [Contact](https://soldwithpaul.com/contact.html): Phone, email, and contact form for consultations and home valuations
- [Blog](https://soldwithpaul.com/blog.html): Hub page listing all published articles on SoCal real estate
